productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boy's Kaleb White Brown Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: Light blue, grey and khakhi checks shirt made of 100% cotton with two patch pockets on the chest, applique near left hem, embroidery and graphic on the backshorts: Khakhi cargo shorts made of cotton, with elasticated waist, two insert pockets on the front, mock zipper and pocket flap near left leg hem, two patch pockets on the back with velcro closures and with a white woven belt that has rounded metal loopsFittingTop: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Shorts: Regular98 cm (24-30 months)Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge the new-to-the-world feel of your little boy in this check shirt and khakhi shorts combo from gini and jony. The sublime "Baby born recently" lettering on the back of the shirt adds to the happy child-like joy of this shirt. Team this with the super comfy shorts and crocs footwear for happy, casual outings with your little one, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on his skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
